Video.summary: TFH celebrates Alfred Hitchcock and the masterful storytelling that still keeps audiences on the edge of their seats.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It was a “Night Of The Living Dead” that “I Walked With A Zombie” to finally meet “Rosemary’s Baby.”
Video.title: Hallowed Horror Vol. 1

Video.summary: It was an eerie night of "Dark Shadows” when I caught the “Brain Dead,” "Cemetery Man” looking just like a “Zombie.” He was caught “Burying The Ex” for her life insurance policy.
Video.title: Hallowed Horror Vol. 2

Video.summary: These women play for keeps in the darkest alleys of noir cinema.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From smoldering glances to deadly betrayals, these thrillers show just how far desire can push the human heart.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: When horror wears an alluring face, loyalties blur and desire becomes the deadliest curse of all.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fatale Femmes Vol. 3: Daughters of Darkness
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Looking back at the iconic films of horror director George A. Romero.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From 'Haunted Hill' to Corman classics, Vincent Price sent shivers down the spines of horror fans for decades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Vincent Price: Master of the Silver Scream
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From gunslingers to rebel heroes, Clint Eastwood brings grit, charm, and intensity in a way that no other movie star can.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Red River to Rio Bravo, outlaws and legends collide in some of the greatest Westerns ever made.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Dollars to Django and beyond, Italian westerns captured the frontier with style, scale, and unforgettable antiheroes.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante celebrates the noir classics that explore themes of identity, paranoia, and duality.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Enter the minds of the twisted geniuses who gave birth to monstrous creations and big screen horrors.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mad, Mad, Mad Scientists Vol. 1: Monstrous Minds
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Explore the dark side of scientific ambition, where unhinged minds push the boundaries of big screen horror.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mad, Mad, Mad Scientists Vol. 2: The Perils of Playing God
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Reckless experiments lead to monstrous results in these horrific Hollywood cult hits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mad, Mad, Mad Scientists Vol. 3: Experiments Gone Awry
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A gripping collection of noir classics, where crime, corruption, and fate collide on the big screen.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hardboiled & Haunted: The Art of Noir Cinema
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Open a can of “whoop-ass” with the “Swinging Cheerleaders,” “Sex Kittens,” and ‘Switchblade Sisters”
Video.title: Attack of the Grindhouse

Video.summary: Duck You Suckers! It's time for more Grindhouse trailer fun from TFH!
Video.title: Revenge of the Grindhouse

Video.summary: Stung by the thought of losing her cosmetics empire, a woman goes to extreme and horrific lengths to find a cure for aging.
Video.title: The Wasp Woman

Video.summary: Mutated beasts, creepy crawlies, and more movie monsters are coming to get you!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Vincent Price is throwing a party, and he’s invited five strangers with the promise of $10,000 each, if they can survive the night in the House on Haunted Hill. Director William Castle helmed this 1959 horror hit, which famously utilized the “Emergo” theatrical gimmick to spook moviegoers out of their seats.
Video.title: House on Haunted Hill

Video.summary: These iconic zombie movies are coming to eat your brain!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These mystery movies have gripped audiences for decades. What's their secret?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Like your Film Noir with a dash of “Body Heat,” while having dinner in “Chinatown?” Tune in!
Video.title: Neo-Noir Necessities

Video.summary: The dead walk! Seven strangers try to survive the night in a Pennsylvania farmhouse surrounded by flesh-eating zombies.
Video.title: Night of the Living Dead

Video.summary: Gone for two years, Mary (Ava Gardner) returns to her hometown and finds herself caught up in a deadly scheme involving her former lover (George Raft) and his nightclub owner rival (Tom Conway). Based on the 1941 novel by Maritta M. Wolff, Whistle Stop was a box office hit in 1946.
Video.title: Whistle Stop

Video.summary: In this noir classic, Edmond O’Brien stars as Frank Bigelow, an accountant who unknowingly swallows deadly toxin and is given days to live. Determined to find out who did it, and why, Frank begins to put the pieces together. But will he find his killer before it’s too late?
Video.title: D.O.A.

Video.summary: A gunman (Jack Palance) makes a fatal mistake when he and his gang ravage a town and murder the local priest (Lee Van Cleef). Now, the priest’s twin brother vows revenge, and teams with a local boy (Leif Garrett) to bring the gunman and his gang to their knees. Lee Van Cleef played dual roles in this 1977 Spaghetti Western produced by Golan-Globus Productions.
Video.title: God's Gun
